topic: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Front view: A yellow NYC taxi drives through Times Square, street-level, front bumper in frame.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Side-angle: The taxi cruises past neon ads, side profile in sharp relief as lights smear into a city blur.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Wide: The taxi continues through the intersection, full car framed against neon signage and street-level architecture.
parsed_generation.narration: An eight-second street-level journey of a yellow NYC taxi through Times Square, staged in three cinematic beats. It begins with a front view, transitions to a side-angle, and ends with a wide shot to reveal the full car against neon signage.

feedback: The result largely captures a yellow NYC taxi in Times Square with a street-level vibe and uses timestamped shot segments. However, it deviates from the gold standard by using a front/side/wide sequence instead of a two-shot wide followed by a street-level tracking shot; to better match, swap to an establishing wide shot of Times Square in [00:00-00:04] and follow with a street-level tracking shot of the taxi passing the camera in [00:04-00:08], emphasizing neon reflections and signage. The language is cinematic but could be tightened to mirror the gold's tempo and specificity.

Subject-focused on the yellow taxi with a neon urban backdrop
fixes: Align shot order and duration with the gold standard (establishing wide [00:00-00:04], then street-level tracking [00:04-00:08]).
